title: Revision Day 1
description: Comprehensive revision of Days 1-9. Revisit Be Verb, Has/Have/Had, Will Have, and Use of There. Mixed practice to strengthen all concepts learned so far in the 75 Days Hard English course.

subtopics.title: Be Verb Revision
subtopics.description: Revise is/am/are/was/were. Quick recap and practice exercises.

subtopics.title: Have / Has / Had Revision
subtopics.description: Revise have, has, had, will have with mixed exercises.

subtopics.title: Modal Verbs Revision
subtopics.description: Quick revision of can, could, will, would, should, must.

subtopics.title: Mixed Practice
subtopics.description: 100 mixed Hindi-to-English translation exercises from Days 1-9.

learningObjectives: Revise has, have, had, will have
Build confidence with previously learned structures
